visual_description: The scene opens with a close-up of two men in a dimly lit, tiled room. One man, with short dark hair, is seen from behind, while the other, an older man with gray hair in a light-colored suit, looks on with a concerned expression. The camera then cuts to a different man with long dark hair, wearing a dark shirt, standing in front of a metal security gate.
audio_description: A male voice shouts urgently in a foreign language, followed by a low, ominous musical tone.
